source.section: Part 15 - Navigation & Case III Recovery > 5 - Waypoints > 5.3 - Manual vs Auto Sequencing

steps.action: Go in HSI (Horizontal Situation Indicator) page
Select desired Waypoint Sequence (SEQ#1, SEQ#2 or SEQ#3 depending on your flight plan)
Press the OSB (Option Select Button) next to AUTO if you want automatic waypoint sequencing (boxed). Leave it OFF if you want manual waypoint sequencing (unboxed) 5 - WAYPOINTS
